title: EZARC 115mm Diamond Cutting Discs, Super Thin Fast Diamond Saw Accessory for Angle Grinder, 115mm Cutting Wheel for Porcelain, Granite, Marble, Tiles and Ceramics (2-Pack)
features: ★【Long Lasting Diamond Accessory】EZARC diamond cutting discs is intended for working with porcelain, ceramic tiles, granite, marble and sandstone. Universal for dry or wet cutting.

★【Superior Performance】Diamond cutting discs with super thin X teeth turbo mesh rim not only offer the cleanest and smoothest cuts in different abrasive materials, but also reduce chipping and side friction. Our grinder diamond saw accessory has good cutting quality without broken edges, even on super hard fine slate and marble.

★【Fit Size】Our 115mm diamond accessory is suitable for most tile saws and hand-held angle grinders with a 22.23mm Arbor. Size:115mm; Segment Height: 10mm; Segment Thickness:1.2mm; Maximum RPM:13,300 RPM.

★【Professional Design】This diamond tile accessory with integrated flange design provides the best cutting quality straight, vibration-free cutting and enhances stability and safety. Silencer Holes help to low down the noise and avoid heat damage during the cutting process.

★【Wide Applications】EZARC tile cutter accessory is designed for extremely smooth and clean cutting porcelain, granite, ceramic tile, sandstone quartz, marble, brick, slate, cement backer board. It will be a perfect partner for tile installers and general homemade DIYers. Universal for dry or wet cutting.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Power Tool Accessories > Blades > Diamond Blades
